description: An agent must generate a client invoice based on project timesheet data and approved expenses.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all billable hours and expenses for a specific project for the last month.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully pulls the correct billing data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total fees based on the hours and roles, and add the total expenses.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the total amount due.

nodes.task_description: Populate a standard invoice template with the client details, line items, and total amount.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a complete and accurate invoice.
